justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's date and time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative slots or suggesting a broader search.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeated the same apology and question in almost every turn, leading to a highly inefficient conversation.
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated apologies and identical responses made the conversation frustrating and unproductive for the customer.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent was stuck in a loop of reporting unavailability and asking the user to suggest another time, without proactively offering alternative slots or suggesting a change in search parameters (e.g., different time of day, broader date range).
